response.justification: Bogdan's resume does not demonstrate the required expertise in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization. His background is heavily focused on software development, web/mobile applications, and general system architecture, lacking the specialized hardware or deep-learning workload experience needed for this Principal Performance Architect role. The required qualifications (e.g., PhD/Master's in hardware engineering or equivalent) are not met.
strengths: Extensive software development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Strong problem-solving and performance optimization skills in distributed systems
Proven ability to deliver large-scale projects and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware
Lacks background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture
Educational background does not align with required qualifications (no advanced degree in engineering/CS)
